About me

I've spent 10+ years making backend systems faster, cheaper, and harder to break — across fintech consulting, insurance platforms, and now one of Canada's Big 5 banks.

At CIBC, I lead a cross-functional team modernising legacy banking infrastructure into cloud-ready microservices. Before that, at Synechron, I delivered cloud migrations and API ecosystems for large-scale insurance clients from Nashville.

My approach: architecture-first, metrics-always. I don't ship features — I ship systems that can absorb the next five features without breaking.
